# Weaver's Tools

- **Ability:** Dexterity
- **Utilize:** Mend a tear in clothing (DC 10), or sew a Tiny design (DC 10)
- **Craft:** [[padded_armor]], [[basket]], [[bedroll]], [[blanket]], [[fine_clothes]], [[net]], [[robe]], [[rope]], [[sack]], [[string]], [[tent]], [[traveler_s_clothes|Traveler's Clothes]]
